note: HOLDOUT. Routine note from an enrolled daycare educator.

input.rawContent:
From: toddlers@sunnydays-daycare.ca
Subject: Photos from today + a small reminder

Hi families, we had so much fun finger painting today! Quick reminder that sunscreen season is here — please bring a labelled bottle. Also the centre closes early (3 PM) this Friday for staff training. — Educator Dani
